title: best herbal teas for cold
description: Plantago lanceolata tea contains various bioactive constituents, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are known to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that help to alleviate cold symptoms. The tea's decongestant properties assist in relieving nasal congestion and sore throats, while its expectorant properties aid in loosening and expelling mucus from the respiratory tract.
